q_hub_01.name: Welcome to the Nexus
q_hub_01.description: Instructor Vex wants you to explore the Nexus. Visit the Training Hall, the Bazaar, and the Gateway Chamber.

rewards.message: Vex nods approvingly. 'Good. You know the lay of the land now.'

q_hub_02.name: Bazaar Delivery
q_hub_02.description: The shopkeeper needs a package delivered to the Archivist in the Library.

objectives.description: Deliver the package to the Archivist

rewards.message: The Archivist takes the package. 'Ah, the texts I ordered. Thank you.'

q_hub_03.name: The Lost Pendant
q_hub_03.description: A weeping traveler lost her pendant somewhere in the Nexus gardens. Find it and return it to her.

rewards.message: 'My grandmother's pendant! Thank you so much. Please, take this charm.'

q_z1_01.name: Wolf Pelts
q_z1_01.description: The village tanner needs 3 wolf pelts. Kill wolves in the Darkwood to collect them.

rewards.message: 'Fine pelts! Here's your payment, and I've reinforced your grip — you'll hit harder now.'

q_z1_02.name: Herb Gathering
q_z1_02.description: The village healer needs Moonpetal herbs from the forest. Gather 5 from the Moonlit Glade.

rewards.message: 'Wonderful! These will save lives. Here — I've brewed you a tonic that permanently strengthens your constitution.'

q_z1_03.name: The Cursed Compass
q_z1_03.description: A strange merchant claims a Mysterious Compass will lead you to untold riches. Follow its directions through the Darkwood.

objectives.description: Follow the compass to the Dead End Clearing

rewards.message: 'Ha! You actually followed it? That compass doesn't point anywhere. Consider it a lesson in skepticism, friend.'

q_z1_04.name: Clear the Bandit Camp
q_z1_04.description: Bandits have set up camp on the King's Road. Clear them out.

rewards.message: 'The roads are safer now. Take this — we found it in their loot pile.'

q_z1_05.name: The Singing Stone
q_z1_05.description: A bard tells you of a Singing Stone hidden deep in the ruins. He says it holds the secret to the marble's path. Find it.

rewards.message: 'Hmm, it doesn't sing for you either? Perhaps it only sings for round things. Interesting...'

q_z1_06.name: Escort the Pilgrim
q_z1_06.description: A pilgrim needs safe passage through the Darkwood to the Chapel of Stars.

objectives.description: Escort the Pilgrim to the Chapel

rewards.message: 'Bless you, traveler. The stars will watch over you now.'

q_z2_01.name: Data Courier
q_z2_01.description: A fixer needs you to deliver a data chip to a contact in the Lower Slums. Don't get caught.

objectives.description: Deliver the chip to the contact in the Lower Slums

rewards.message: 'Clean delivery. You're good at this. Here's your cut.'

q_z2_02.name: Drone Scrap Collection
q_z2_02.description: A tech vendor needs drone parts. Destroy security drones and bring back their processors.

rewards.message: 'Beautiful. These processors are worth a fortune. Here — I modded something for you.'

q_z2_03.name: The Ghost in the Machine
q_z2_03.description: A hacker claims there's an AI fragment in the old server farm that knows where the marble went. Find it.

rewards.message: 'The fragment is corrupted. It just keeps repeating coordinates that don't exist. Dead end. Sorry, choom.'

q_z2_04.name: Neon Debt
q_z2_04.description: A desperate shop owner owes money to the gangs. Help clear the debt by eliminating their enforcers.

rewards.message: 'They won't bother me again. You're a lifesaver. Take this — military-grade stim.'

q_z2_05.name: Signal Trace
q_z2_05.description: Someone is broadcasting on a dead frequency. Trace the signal through three relay towers.

rewards.message: 'The signal was just an old automated ad loop. Decades old. Nothing useful. But hey, you mapped those towers for me.'

q_z3_01.name: Missing Persons
q_z3_01.description: A worried wife needs you to find her husband. He was last seen near the docks.

rewards.message: 'He was hiding from his gambling debts? That fool. Thank you, detective.'

q_z3_02.name: Rat Extermination
q_z3_02.description: The bar owner has a rat problem in the cellar. Big rats. Unnaturally big.

rewards.message: 'Drinks are on the house tonight. And take this — found it in the rat nest.'

q_z3_03.name: The Informant's Tip
q_z3_03.description: An informant says he saw something round and shiny roll through the speakeasy last Tuesday. Follow his lead.

rewards.message: 'Turns out it was just a ball bearing from a busted machine. The informant sends his apologies. And his bar tab.'

q_z3_04.name: Collect Evidence
q_z3_04.description: The DA needs evidence against the crime boss. Search his office and his warehouse.

rewards.message: 'This is enough to put him away. The city owes you. Here — bulletproof vest, courtesy of the department.'

q_z3_05.name: The Phantom Witness
q_z3_05.description: A ghost reportedly haunts the old courthouse. Some say it witnessed the marble pass through decades ago.

objectives.description: Enter the Old Courthouse at midnight

rewards.message: 'There's no ghost. Just pigeons and a broken window that makes weird sounds. Classic misdirection.'

q_z4_01.name: Weapons Cache
q_z4_01.description: The resistance needs weapons. There's a cache hidden in the old bunker. Retrieve it.

rewards.message: 'Hell yeah! Now we're talking. Take one for yourself — you earned it, soldier.'

q_z4_02.name: Demolition Run
q_z4_02.description: Plant explosives at three enemy checkpoints along the highway.

rewards.message: 'BOOM! Beautiful. Three for three. Here's your hazard pay.'

q_z4_03.name: The Colonel's Map
q_z4_03.description: A defector says the Colonel has a map showing where 'the sphere' was taken. Infiltrate his compound.

rewards.message: 'The map shows... supply routes. That's it. The defector was wrong. Or lying. Probably lying.'

q_z4_04.name: Rescue the POWs
q_z4_04.description: Three soldiers are being held in the enemy camp. Break them out.

rewards.message: 'You saved our boys. The brass is impressed. Take this armor upgrade — you'll need it.'

q_z4_05.name: Chopper Down
q_z4_05.description: A helicopter crashed in hostile territory. Recover the black box before the enemy does.

rewards.message: 'The black box is secure. Intel says there's something interesting in the flight data. Here — take these night-vision goggles.'

q_z5_01.name: Spirit Cleansing
q_z5_01.description: Corrupted spirits haunt the Lower Shards. Defeat them to restore balance.

rewards.message: 'The spirits are at peace. Your ki grows stronger with each act of compassion.'

q_z5_02.name: The Tea Master's Request
q_z5_02.description: The Tea Master needs rare Cloud Blossoms that only grow on the highest shards.

rewards.message: 'Exquisite. Drink this tea — it will permanently fortify your body.'

q_z5_03.name: The Dragon's Whisper
q_z5_03.description: An old monk says the wind dragon saw the marble fly between the shards. Meditate at three shrines to hear its whisper.

objectives.description: Meditate at the Shrine of Wind
Meditate at the Shrine of Cloud
Meditate at the Shrine of Storm

rewards.message: 'The dragon whispers... nothing about a marble. It just complains about the weather. Dragons are like that.'

q_z5_04.name: Tournament of Blades
q_z5_04.description: Prove your worth in the tournament. Defeat three arena champions.

rewards.message: 'You are the new champion! Take this legendary blade — you've earned it.'

q_z5_05.name: The Painted Scroll
q_z5_05.description: A painter claims she captured the marble in a scroll painting years ago. Find the scroll in the Abandoned Gallery.

rewards.message: 'The painting shows... a peach. She painted a peach. It's a very nice peach, but it's not a marble.'

q_z6_01.name: Gladiator's Debut
q_z6_01.description: The arena master wants fresh blood. Fight in the colosseum to earn your freedom.

rewards.message: 'The crowd loves you! Here — gladiator's armor. You've earned the right to wear it.'

q_z6_02.name: The Scholar's Tablets
q_z6_02.description: A scholar needs ancient tablets recovered from the catacombs for translation.

rewards.message: 'Fascinating! These describe trade routes from a thousand years ago. Here's your fee.'

q_z6_03.name: The Oracle's Vision
q_z6_03.description: The Oracle claims to have seen the marble in a vision. She says it rests in the Tomb of the Forgotten King.

objectives.description: Enter the Tomb of the Forgotten King

rewards.message: 'The Oracle's visions are... unreliable. The tomb held only dust and bones. She apologizes. Sort of.'

q_z6_04.name: Supply the Legion
q_z6_04.description: The legion quartermaster needs iron ingots. The mines to the east have plenty.

rewards.message: 'Good iron. The smiths will put it to use. And here — a blade forged from the last batch.'

q_z6_05.name: The Merchant's Route
q_z6_05.description: Bandits plague the trade road. Escort the merchant caravan safely through.

rewards.message: 'Safe passage! The merchants are grateful. Take this rare artifact they found on the road.'

wizard_research.name: The Wizard's Scattered Research
wizard_research.description: Aldric the wizard needs you to recover three pieces of his research scattered when the sphere destroyed his tower: the Planar Resonance Journal, the Containment Theory Scrolls, and the Fragment of the Eastern Ward.
wizard_research.completion_text: You found them! Let me see... yes, yes, this confirms what I suspected. The sphere's trajectory isn't random — it's following ley lines. Ancient ones, older than this tower, older than this kingdom. It's heading... hmm. I need more time to calculate. But I can tell you this: wherever it's going, it's getting there faster. And it's getting stronger. Here — take this for your trouble. And if you learn anything more about the sphere, come find me. I have a feeling our paths will cross again.

rh_compass.name: The Lost Navigator
rh_compass.description: A ghost in the Docks claims their compass was stolen. Find it in the Neon District.

rewards.message: The ghost takes one look at the compass and fades away without a word. Odd.

rh_prism.name: Prismatic Research
rh_prism.description: A researcher needs a cracked prism from the Astral Plane for their experiments.

rewards.message: The researcher examines the prism, shrugs, and hands it back. 'Not what I needed after all.'

rh_letter.name: Undeliverable Mail
rh_letter.description: The Bartender found a sealed letter behind the bar. Deliver it to room 3033.

rewards.message: Nobody here knows who this letter is for. You keep it.

rh_sphere.name: The Hollow Prize
rh_sphere.description: Legends speak of a hollow sphere hidden in the Forgotten Epoch. Find it.

rewards.message: You found it. It's... hollow. Completely hollow. A merchant might pay for it though.

rh_blueprint.name: Architect's Folly
rh_blueprint.description: An old blueprint was spotted in the Warzone. Retrieve it before it's destroyed.

rewards.message: The blueprint depicts a building that defies physics. Interesting, but useless.
